title: taraxacum hastiliforme
intro: Taraxacum hastiliforme, also known as the sword-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with leaves shaped like swords, which are commonly used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum hastiliforme include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of this plant include relieving symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, and its herbal preparations can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture.
